title: MUM-113 My homeroom teacher told me to come here. Mel 149cm
overview: I appeared in the image video in secret at school. My homeroom teacher found out and told me to "drop out" or "take off". He touched my leg the whole time and said, "I won't do anything wrong." I didn't want to drop out, so I did as I was told. When I held my leg, something stuck out. A stranger came to the room when I put out a white thing. I was staring at my crotch with a spinning stick. After that, I kept shaking my hips without a break.
